mapper.sql: select trial_id, trial_name, trial_level, bonus_rate, valid_days, valid_start_time, valid_end_time, total_count, received_count, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_level_trial_template
mapper.insert: insert into sys_level_trial_template(trial_name, trial_level, bonus_rate, valid_days, valid_start_time, valid_end_time, total_count, received_count, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{trialName}, #{trialLevel}, #{bonusRate}, #{validDays}, #{validStartTime}, #{validEndTime}, #{totalCount}, #{receivedCount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_level_trial_template where trial_id in
#{trialId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_level_trial_user(trial_id, user_id, user_name, grant_type, original_level, current_level, status, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{trialId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{grantType}, null, null, '0', null, null, #{operator}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sys_level_trial_template set received_count = ifnull(received_count, 0) + ifnull(#{amount}, 0), update_time = now() where trial_id = #{trialId}
